channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Las Vegas man killed by police while on 911 call
item.description: Brandon Durham, 43, of Las Vegas, died at the home on Tuesday, Nov. 12. Police said he was pronounced deceased at a hospital a short time thereafter.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, NewsNation

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs' third bid to be released on bail won't be decided until next week
item.description: A judge says he’ll rule next week on Sean “Diddy” Combs’ third request to be released from jail on bail while he awaits his sex trafficking trial.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NATO and Ukraine to hold emergency talks after Russia's attack with new hypersonic missile
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — NATO and Ukraine will hold emergency talks Tuesday after Russia attacked a central city with an experimental, hypersonic ballistic missile that escalated the nearly 33-month-old war.
item.dc:creator: ILLIA NOVIKOV and VOLODYMYR YURCHUK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: McDonald's unveils new value menu, extends $5 Meal Deal
item.description: McDonald’s is offering its customers more ways to save on Big Macs, McNuggets, and other food items beginning in the New Year. The fast-food giant announced on Friday that it will launch a new everyday value menu on Jan.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Youngkin announces order to protect children from social media
item.description: Governor Glenn Youngkin issued an executive order on Thursday in the hopes of protecting children from addictive social media platforms.
item.dc:creator: Madie MacDonald, NewsNation

item.title: Storm inundates Northern California with rain, heavy snow. Thousands remain in the dark in Seattle
item.description: HEALDSBURG, Calif. (AP) — Heavy rain from a major storm prompted evacuations from communities near a Northern California river that forecasters said could breach its banks Friday, as the system continued to dump heavy snow in mountainous areas where some ski resorts opened for the season.
item.dc:creator: NOAH BERGER and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Teen suspect arrested after cheerleader found dead in woods
item.description: Tennessee cheerleader Savannah Copeland, 13, was allegedly stabbed to death by a 15-year-old after the pair met up around midnight Oct. 22.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas education board approves optional Bible-infused curriculum for elementary schools
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas’ education board voted Friday to allow Bible-infused teachings in elementary schools under optional new curriculum that could test boundaries between religion and public classrooms in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN and KENDRIA LAFLEUR, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Colorado funeral home owners who let nearly 190 bodies decay plead guilty to corpse abuse
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (AP) — The owners of a Colorado funeral home who let nearly 190 bodies decay in a room-temperature building and gave grieving families fake ashes pleaded guilty on Friday to corpse abuse.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Officer kills pet dog mistaken for a coyote in Massachusetts town. The owner says it was unnecessary
item.description: An animal control officer shot and killed a pet dog in a Massachusetts town after mistaking it for a coyote in an incident local police are describing as a sad mix-up.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 2 convicted in human smuggling case after Indian family froze to death on US-Canada border
item.description: FERGUS FALLS, Minn. (AP) — A jury convicted two men on Friday of charges related to human smuggling for their roles in an international operation that led to the deaths of a family of Indian migrants who froze while trying to cross the Canada-U.S. border during a 2022 blizzard.
item.dc:creator: MARK VANCLEAVE and MICHAEL GOLDBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about a Wisconsin man who faked his own death and fled to Eastern Europe
item.description: GREEN LAKE, Wis. (AP) — A Wisconsin man who faked his own drowning this summer and left his wife and three children has been located in Eastern Europe and is communicating with law enforcement, but he has not committed to returning home, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Supreme Court steps into fight over FCC's $8 billion subsidies for internet and phone services
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Friday stepped into a major legal fight over the $8 billion a year the federal government spends to subsidize phone and internet services in schools, libraries and rural areas, in a new test of federal regulatory power.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Conneticut police seize nearly 4K bags of fentanyl
item.description: WATERBURY, Conn. (WTNH) -- A Waterbury woman was arrested on drug charges after an investigation led police to seize thousands of bags of fentanyl and hundreds of grams of cocaine, police said.
item.dc:creator: Jareliz Diaz, NewsNation

item.title: Woman in coma after trying to save pro golfer's 6-year-old son from drowning
item.description: Professional golfer Brian Harman revealed that a close family friend has been in a coma for weeks after trying to save his 6-year-old son from a near-drowning.
item.dc:creator: Natasha Young, WGN 9

item.title: California officer shot, killed knife-wielding man after attack outside police headquarters: bodycam video
item.description: The Santa Monica Police Department released bodycam footage of a knife attack on an officer outside police headquarters that ended with the suspect being shot dead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CDC confirms bird flu in a child in California, first reported avian influenza virus in child
item.description: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said on Friday it has confirmed a human infection with H5N1 bird flu in a child in California. This is the first reported avian influenza H5 virus infection in a child in the nation.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Las Vegas senior couple in refund limbo after Amazon purchase
item.description: When the couple needed to return a chair with missing parts, the shipping fee was more than the cost.
item.dc:creator: James Schaeffer, NewsNation

item.title: Christmas TV movies are in their Taylor Swift era, with two Swift-inspired films airing this year
item.description: Two new Christmas TV movies have a Taylor Swift connection that her fans would have no problem decoding. “Christmas in the Spotlight” debuts Saturday on Lifetime.
item.dc:creator: ALICIA RANCILIO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 3 Utah children missing since 2022 found living with FLDS Church, returned to mother
item.description: Three Utah children missing for two years have been located living with members of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, according to the Fredonia Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Alabama carries out third nitrogen hypoxia execution in the country
item.description: Carey Dale Grayson, 50, fought his restraints and raised both middle fingers just before gas was administered, a witness said.
item.dc:creator: Asher Redd, Fox 5

item.title: Trump-backed Derek Merrin concedes to Democratic U.S. Rep. Marcy Kaptur in Ohio
item.description: Democratic U.S. Rep. Marcy Kaptur’s Trump-endorsed rival said he called the veteran Ohio congresswoman to concede defeat in the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Julie Carr Smyth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Video: Bear cub yanked from tree for 'selfie' released back in the wild
item.description: A bear cub, one of two pulled from a tree as a person posed for a photo, has been returned to the wild.
item.dc:creator: Rodney Overton, NewsNation

item.title: Disneyland Paris turns into real-life winter wonderland after season's 1st snowfall
item.description: The season’s first snowfall has turned Disneyland Paris into a real-life winter wonderland. Disney Parks shared a video on Thursday showing snow covering Main Street, U.S.A, Sleeping Beauty Castle, and all the festive holiday décor. It’s currently pouring snow at Disneyland Paris. pic.twitter.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Kit Kats to come in new shape for the first time ever in America
item.description: The Hershey Company has debuted Kit Kats in the shape of something other than a traditional Kit Kat "finger.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, KRON4

item.title: OpenTable names 2024's 'Top 100 Restaurants' in America
item.description: OpenTable's analysts based their findings on more than 14 million diner reviews, along with diner ratings, reservation demand, and percentage of five-star reviews, among other factors.
item.dc:creator: Mac Bell, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What foods you can -- and can't -- take on a plane, according to TSA
item.description: Before you pack your bags to bring a family-favorite food to the table, it's important to know what is allowed through airport security - and what isn't.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Gaetz withdraws from attorney general consideration
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) has withdrawn his nomination to be Attorney General for President-elect Trump.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, KTLA 5

item.title: Wisconsin man who faked his own kayaking death fled the country and won't come home, officials say
item.description: Borgwardt, 45, was reported missing on Aug. 12 after he failed to return home from kayaking on Big Green Lake, the Green Lake County Sheriff’s Office said at the time.
item.dc:creator: Ben Newhouse, KRON4

item.title: Trump watches as Musk’s SpaceX launches Starship rocket
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is expected to attend the launch of a SpaceX rocket in Texas on Tuesday, sources familiar with the plans confirmed, in the latest sign of Trump’s closeness to the company's billionaire CEO Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9
